footer.description: Engineering scalable backends and modern web experiences.

hero.description: Fullstack Developer (Node.js, PostgreSQL, Next.js). Delivering data-driven solutions for organizations like Club Atlético Lanús. Focus on performance, clean architecture, and rapid delivery.

expertise.title: Technical Expertise
expertise.backend_desc: Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, GraphQL. Strong emphasis on data integrity and query optimization.
expertise.frontend_desc: React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS. Focus on responsive, accessible, and fast-loading user interfaces.
expertise.devops_desc: Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Vercel, and Linux environments. Ensuring smooth deployments and high availability.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.description: A selection of case studies detailing architectural decisions, technical debt resolution, and backend scalability improvements.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.description: I'm currently open for engineering roles. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

about.title: About Me
about.philosophy_p1: I believe that great software starts with the data model. When the foundation is solid, building seamless user experiences becomes a natural consequence, not an uphill battle. My approach centers on writing clean, testable code that teams can actually maintain.
about.philosophy_p2: Beyond the code, I value clear communication and pragmatic problem-solving. Whether it’s architecting a complex database schema for a high-traffic initiative like Club Atlético Lanús or pixel-perfecting a Next.js frontend, my goal is always the same: to deliver tangible business value through robust engineering.
about.experience_lanus_desc: Collaborating with the development of the Club Atlético Lanús museum, architecting a high-performance statistics portal using Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Next.js.
